evals.prompt: Clients cannot connect with Kerberos to our SQL AG listener — they fall back to NTLM. I have setspn output and AD attributes for the service account. What is missing?
evals.expected_output: K-checks for missing SPN on listener name (K3), duplicate SPN (K8), service account UAC flags (K19), delegation config (K21 KCD / K24 RBCD). Concrete setspn -A commands to fix.

evals.prompt: We have unconstrained delegation on the SQL service account. Is this dangerous?
evals.expected_output: K20 unconstrained delegation flagged Critical. Explains the security risk (ticket forwarding, lateral movement). Recommends migration to KCD (K21) or RBCD (K24) with specific PowerShell commands.
